name: PUPassCard
description: Branded WiFi pass card with a 2:1 aspect ratio. Supports a holographic 3D-tilt + rainbow shimmer effect on focus (holo prop), stacked-depth dimming for Apple Wallet-style layering, and an optional amber warning badge. Typically rendered inside PUWalletStack.

props.name: title
props.description: Pass name displayed on the card

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Solid background colour or gradient start colour

props.name: gradientTo
props.description: Gradient end colour — rendered as a 135° linear gradient

props.name: logoSrc
props.description: URL or path for a logo image rendered bottom-left

props.name: badgeSrc
props.description: URL or path for a badge image rendered bottom-right

props.name: holo
props.description: Enables holographic 3D tilt (±8°) and rainbow shimmer on mouse move

props.name: stackDepth
props.description: Depth position in a stack. 0 = top card (no effect). 1+ applies brightness dimming and a white top-edge inset highlight

props.name: warning
props.description: Renders an amber warning badge in the bottom-right corner

props.name: onClick
props.description: Optional click handler — enables pointer cursor
